title: ReleaseManifest
description: An immutable manifest describing the outputs, digests, labels, and evidence refs for a promoted or publishable release cut.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

sourceBuildRequestRef.description: Optional ref back to the BuildRequest that produced this release.

artifactRefs.description: Refs or URLs for release artifacts or bundle outputs.

artifactHashes.description: Digest values for the artifacts included in this release.

sbomRefs.description: Optional SBOM refs linked to the release outputs.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence bundles or receipts associated with the release.

labels.description: Human or machine labels for channeling, customer rings, or support metadata.

channel.description: Optional release channel such as dev, qa, or prod.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the release manifest.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the release manifest was created.
